title: popcount/clz/ctz/rotl/rotr
manager: The bit-population and bit-rotation intrinsics — popcount, count-leading-zeros, count-trailing-zeros, rotate-left/right — for machines modeling low-level hardware or doing bitset tricks. Each maps to a single CPU instruction in a compiled host, so having them as blessed builtins means the codegen can emit the fast instruction instead of an unrolled loop that computes the same thing slowly.
cs: popcount/clz/ctz/rotl/rotr on sized ints (W6.2); width-aware; lower to native intrinsics in compiled targets.
